items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but there is no evidence provided that confirms how the system handles waitlisting or the expected outcomes of such a scenario. The linked use case and prior steps do not address the specific behavior of the system in relation to waitlisting, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the requirement's coverage.
